data.body: Implemented: tracker_dir() routed through load_config (full precedence, env-verbatim fast path, ConfigError->default fallback); new tickets_branch() resolver (propagates ConfigError by design); reads.py duplicate unified to source the dir NAME from config while preserving its git work-tree validation gate + sys.exit. Subagent review: clean, no blockers — added the recommended comment on the tickets_branch/tracker_dir error-handling asymmetry. 548 tests pass (incl. the 3 malformed-config gate tests); ruff clean.
